SMILE INDEX: 70
WINDOW: 1001.900s to 1039.300s (smile at 1021.900s to 1024.300s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[722.850-1086.150] interviewee: they bombarded all Polish airports. And for this reason, not one Polish airplane could go up and fight the Germans, all gone. Right in the morning, when I  saw the Germans ordered in, I went to the station and took the last train to Krakow. This was south of Katowice from Silesia. I joined my army. And we retreated,

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
and took the last train
